lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Commodity market database — live buy/sell spreads that turn cargo tonnage into realised credits/hour.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Trader
sources.what: Trading career mechanics and ship suitability behind the cargo-hauler ranking.

sources.label: Spansh
sources.what: Trade-route plotting that turns raw cargo tonnage into realised credits/hour.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Ranked countdown of the top cargo hulls, covering medium and large freighters plus the new Panther Clipper.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Head-to-head of the Imperial Cutter and Type-9 Heavy on cargo capacity, speed, defences and unlock cost.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Hands-on test of the Type-8 Transporter across hauling, mining and exploration on a medium pad.
